name: Onkyo Home Entertainment Corporation
summary: Onkyo Home Entertainment Corp. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells audio equipment, electronic equipment, in-vehicle speakers, etc. primarily under ONKYO brand in Japan and internationally. The company was formerly known as ONKYO Corporation and changed its name to Onkyo Home Entertainment Corp. in September 2020. Onkyo Home Entertainment Corp. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
